items.title: Want Decades of Passive Income? Buy This Index Fund and Hold It Forever.
items.author: David Dierking
items.description: The Schwab U.S. Dividend Equity ETF offers a reliable long-term passive income strategy, featuring consistent dividend growth, quality companies, and a current yield of 3.8%, making it attractive for investors seeking steady income over decades.
